title: Deal
description: Canonical record for a single investment — created at approval, never overwritten. Corrections create a new version with supersedes_ref.

id.description: UUID v4. Generated at record creation. Never changes.

slug.description: URL-safe kebab-case identifier. Used in all file paths. Example: acme-corp-series-b

name.description: Human-readable deal name. Example: 'Acme Corp — Series B'

status.description: Lifecycle state. 'prospect' = pre-investment eval. 'active' = capital deployed. 'realized' = full exit. 'written-off' = total loss. 'archived' = rejected during eval.

barbell_layer.description: Which layer of the barbell this deal sits in. Determines monitoring cadence and risk tolerance.

entity.description: Legal entity that holds this investment. Example: 'Smith Family Office LLC', 'Smith Family Trust'

sector.description: Industry/sector. Freeform but prefer standard labels: fintech, healthtech, saas, real-estate, energy, consumer, industrials, public-equity, fixed-income.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol for public securities. Null for private deals.

domain.description: Primary web domain of the company. Used for deterministic deal matching in ingestion pipeline.

investment_date.description: ISO 8601 date of initial capital deployment. Null if status=prospect.

initial_amount_usd.description: Initial investment amount in USD. Null if status=prospect.

current_value_usd.description: Most recent estimated fair value in USD. Populated by valuation pipeline. Null until first valuation.

ownership_pct.description: Percent ownership stake. Null for funds or public equity where ownership pct is not tracked.

provenance.description: Who created this record, when, from what source. Required on every record.

source.description: Where the deal information came from. Example: 'LP intro email from John Smith', 'Inbound deck via AngelList'
examples: LP intro email from John Smith 2024-03-01

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when this record was created.

author.description: Email or name of person who created this record.

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this JSON file at creation time. First 8 chars used in filename.

links.description: Supporting URLs (Notion page, data room link, AngelList, Crunchbase, etc.)

contacts.description: Key contacts associated with this deal. Used for deal matching in ingestion pipeline.

role.description: Their role in this deal context.

deal_doc_pointers.description: Pointers to sensitive documents stored outside the repo (S3, GDrive). Never store actual PDFs in git.

key.description: Path or ID within the storage backend.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the stored file for integrity verification.

thesis_summary.description: Plain-language explanation of why we made this investment. Should be readable by a family member with no finance background. Required on all active deals.
examples: Acme Corp is a B2B SaaS company selling expense management software to mid-market companies. We invested in their Series B because the team has strong prior exits, the market is large ($8B TAM), and their net revenue retention of 118% suggests a sticky product. This is a power-law bet — we expect either a significant return or zero.

VTSAX tracks the entire US stock market. We hold this as our core defensive compounding position because it gives broad diversification at near-zero cost (0.04% expense ratio). It will grow with the US economy over time.

risk_factors.description: Known risks specific to this deal. Each entry is a plain-language statement.
examples: Key-person risk: 70% of revenue tied to CEO relationships
Series C may be difficult in current market
Only 9 months runway at current burn rate

tags.description: Freeform tags for search and filtering.

supersedes_ref.description: Path to the previous version of this deal record, if this is a correction/update.

ic_memo_path.description: Relative path to the IC memo for this deal.

latest_valuation_ref.description: Relative path to the most recent valuation record.
